name: T-Bone Fiorentina with Sauteed Spinach and Da Vero Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 T-bone steak at least 3-inches thick, 3 to 3-1/2 pound
4 pounds spinach, washed, spun dry, stems removed
6 ounces Da Vero extra virgin olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat barbecue to medium high heat.
2. Pat steak dry.
3. In a small bowl, mix rosemary, sage, thyme, pepper, and salt until well blended. Coat the entire steak with spice mix. Brush with pure olive oil.
4. Place on grill and char well. Cook about 12 minutes on the first side, flip, and cook about 9 minutes on the second side. This is traditionally served very rare.
5. Meanwhile, in a 12- to 14-inch saute pan, heat virgin olive oil until smoking. Add garlic and cook until light brown. Add spinach and stir quickly, cooking until just wilted. Remove from heat, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper, and set aside.
6. When steak is done, remove and let stand 5 minutes. Carve off fillet and strip steaks and slice.
7. Divide steak among 4 plates, divide spinach, and drizzle each plate with Da Vero oil. Serve immediately.
